list.name: Changes
list.comment: refactor: resolve static analysis warnings and enforce clean architecture" -m "This commit introduces a comprehensive codebase cleanup based on static analysis and IDE warnings. It enforces strict separation of concerns, improves performance, and resolves potential runtime race conditions across both frontend and backend." -m "Frontend Changes: - index.html & style.css: Removed inline styles and scripts from HTML to strictly decouple UI logic from styling. - main.js: Relocated Lucide icon initialization. Fixed a race condition by adding the missing \`await\` to \`playNextChunk()\`. Resolved 'lucide' variable warning via bracket notation. - api.js: Refactored fetch error handling to eliminate the local 'throw/catch' anti-pattern. Fixed unresolved property warnings using bracket notation for JSON data. - audioEngine.js: Removed localized exception throwing for control flow. Handled \`webkitAudioContext\` IDE warning. Added explicit \`Blob\` instance validation before creating object URLs to prevent type crashes. - textProcessor.js: Eliminated redundant local variables for direct inline returns." -m "Backend Changes: - routers.py: Removed unused exception variable (\`e\`) in the TTS endpoint for cleaner PEP 8 compliance. - services.py: Applied \`@staticmethod\` decorators to \`get_filtered_voices\` and \`generate_audio_and_boundaries\` to optimize memory usage. Replaced broad exceptions with targeted \`OSError\` and \`json.JSONDecodeError\` for safer file handling." -m "Documentation: - architecture.txt: Updated the project tree to accurately reflect the current file structure (including logger.py and README.md).

project.component: { "keyToString": { "HTTP Request.test_api | Generate TTS - Empty Text.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.test_api | Generate TTS - Invalid Voice.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.test_api | Generate TTS - Normal Request.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Python.main.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "ai.playground.ignore.import.keys.banner.in.settings": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "org.jetbrains.plugins.github.ui.GithubSettingsConfigurable", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

item.itemvalue: HTTP Request.test_api | Generate TTS - Normal Request
HTTP Request.test_api | Generate TTS - Invalid Voice
HTTP Request.test_api | Generate TTS - Empty Text

task.summary: feat: add basic text-to-speech conversion using edge-tts
feat: add playback speed control (RATE) to tts conversion
feat: setup FastAPI backend with /api/tts endpoint
feat: create responsive HTML UI with Tailwind and live Markdown parsing
feat: integrate frontend with FastAPI backend for audio generation and preview
feat: implement real-time word-level highlighting synced with audio playback
feat: implement fully automated weighted lexical fallback algorithm for flawless word sync without manual calibration
style: force LTR direction for markdown headings and remove tailwind backticks from inline code
feat: implement language-aware preview text based on selected TTS voice
chore: resolve 'marked' unresolved variable IDE warning using JSDoc type definitions

feat: comprehensive overhaul of TTS AI Studio architecture and features
- Infrastructure & Tooling: * Added `run_project.py` to concurrently run backend and frontend. * Added batch scripts (`start_project.bat`, `clean_cache.bat`) for environment management. * Introduced `requirements.txt`, `.gitignore`, `test_api.http`, and architecture docs.
- Backend (FastAPI & Edge-TTS): * Migrated backend to FastAPI with CORS middleware configured. * Integrated `edge-tts` for speech generation and word boundaries extraction. * Implemented MD5-based file caching system for audio blobs to optimize response times. * Added custom logging mechanism tracking events to `report.txt`. * Restructured code into modular files (routers, services, schemas).
- Frontend (Audio Engine & UI): * Completely rebuilt `audioEngine.js` with IndexedDB caching and Web Audio API visualizer. * Implemented precise word-by-word highlighting synchronized with audio playback. * Added `textProcessor.js` with Markdown parsing and custom `{{visual::phonetic}}` syntax. * Introduced LocalStorage session persistence for user inputs and voice preferences. * Enhanced UX with Focus Mode, custom interactive cursors, and interactive progress tracking.

refactor: resolve static analysis warnings and enforce clean architecture" -m "This commit introduces a comprehensive codebase cleanup based on static analysis and IDE warnings. It enforces strict separation of concerns, improves performance, and resolves potential runtime race conditions across both frontend and backend." -m "Frontend Changes: - index.html & style.css: Removed inline styles and scripts from HTML to strictly decouple UI logic from styling. - main.js: Relocated Lucide icon initialization. Fixed a race condition by adding the missing \`await\` to \`playNextChunk()\`. Resolved 'lucide' variable warning via bracket notation. - api.js: Refactored fetch error handling to eliminate the local 'throw/catch' anti-pattern. Fixed unresolved property warnings using bracket notation for JSON data. - audioEngine.js: Removed localized exception throwing for control flow. Handled \`webkitAudioContext\` IDE warning. Added explicit \`Blob\` instance validation before creating object URLs to prevent type crashes. - textProcessor.js: Eliminated redundant local variables for direct inline returns." -m "Backend Changes: - routers.py: Removed unused exception variable (\`e\`) in the TTS endpoint for cleaner PEP 8 compliance. - services.py: Applied \`@staticmethod\` decorators to \`get_filtered_voices\` and \`generate_audio_and_boundaries\` to optimize memory usage. Replaced broad exceptions with targeted \`OSError\` and \`json.JSONDecodeError\` for safer file handling." -m "Documentation: - architecture.txt: Updated the project tree to accurately reflect the current file structure (including logger.py and README.md).

MESSAGE.value: feat: add basic text-to-speech conversion using edge-tts
feat: add playback speed control (RATE) to tts conversion
feat: setup FastAPI backend with /api/tts endpoint
feat: create responsive HTML UI with Tailwind and live Markdown parsing
feat: integrate frontend with FastAPI backend for audio generation and preview
feat: implement real-time word-level highlighting synced with audio playback
feat: implement fully automated weighted lexical fallback algorithm for flawless word sync without manual calibration
style: force LTR direction for markdown headings and remove tailwind backticks from inline code
feat: implement language-aware preview text based on selected TTS voice
chore: resolve 'marked' unresolved variable IDE warning using JSDoc type definitions

feat: comprehensive overhaul of TTS AI Studio architecture and features
- Infrastructure & Tooling: * Added `run_project.py` to concurrently run backend and frontend. * Added batch scripts (`start_project.bat`, `clean_cache.bat`) for environment management. * Introduced `requirements.txt`, `.gitignore`, `test_api.http`, and architecture docs.
- Backend (FastAPI & Edge-TTS): * Migrated backend to FastAPI with CORS middleware configured. * Integrated `edge-tts` for speech generation and word boundaries extraction. * Implemented MD5-based file caching system for audio blobs to optimize response times. * Added custom logging mechanism tracking events to `report.txt`. * Restructured code into modular files (routers, services, schemas).
- Frontend (Audio Engine & UI): * Completely rebuilt `audioEngine.js` with IndexedDB caching and Web Audio API visualizer. * Implemented precise word-by-word highlighting synchronized with audio playback. * Added `textProcessor.js` with Markdown parsing and custom `{{visual::phonetic}}` syntax. * Introduced LocalStorage session persistence for user inputs and voice preferences. * Enhanced UX with Focus Mode, custom interactive cursors, and interactive progress tracking.

refactor: resolve static analysis warnings and enforce clean architecture" -m "This commit introduces a comprehensive codebase cleanup based on static analysis and IDE warnings. It enforces strict separation of concerns, improves performance, and resolves potential runtime race conditions across both frontend and backend." -m "Frontend Changes: - index.html & style.css: Removed inline styles and scripts from HTML to strictly decouple UI logic from styling. - main.js: Relocated Lucide icon initialization. Fixed a race condition by adding the missing \`await\` to \`playNextChunk()\`. Resolved 'lucide' variable warning via bracket notation. - api.js: Refactored fetch error handling to eliminate the local 'throw/catch' anti-pattern. Fixed unresolved property warnings using bracket notation for JSON data. - audioEngine.js: Removed localized exception throwing for control flow. Handled \`webkitAudioContext\` IDE warning. Added explicit \`Blob\` instance validation before creating object URLs to prevent type crashes. - textProcessor.js: Eliminated redundant local variables for direct inline returns." -m "Backend Changes: - routers.py: Removed unused exception variable (\`e\`) in the TTS endpoint for cleaner PEP 8 compliance. - services.py: Applied \`@staticmethod\` decorators to \`get_filtered_voices\` and \`generate_audio_and_boundaries\` to optimize memory usage. Replaced broad exceptions with targeted \`OSError\` and \`json.JSONDecodeError\` for safer file handling." -m "Documentation: - architecture.txt: Updated the project tree to accurately reflect the current file structure (including logger.py and README.md).

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: refactor: resolve static analysis warnings and enforce clean architecture" -m "This commit introduces a comprehensive codebase cleanup based on static analysis and IDE warnings. It enforces strict separation of concerns, improves performance, and resolves potential runtime race conditions across both frontend and backend." -m "Frontend Changes: - index.html & style.css: Removed inline styles and scripts from HTML to strictly decouple UI logic from styling. - main.js: Relocated Lucide icon initialization. Fixed a race condition by adding the missing \`await\` to \`playNextChunk()\`. Resolved 'lucide' variable warning via bracket notation. - api.js: Refactored fetch error handling to eliminate the local 'throw/catch' anti-pattern. Fixed unresolved property warnings using bracket notation for JSON data. - audioEngine.js: Removed localized exception throwing for control flow. Handled \`webkitAudioContext\` IDE warning. Added explicit \`Blob\` instance validation before creating object URLs to prevent type crashes. - textProcessor.js: Eliminated redundant local variables for direct inline returns." -m "Backend Changes: - routers.py: Removed unused exception variable (\`e\`) in the TTS endpoint for cleaner PEP 8 compliance. - services.py: Applied \`@staticmethod\` decorators to \`get_filtered_voices\` and \`generate_audio_and_boundaries\` to optimize memory usage. Replaced broad exceptions with targeted \`OSError\` and \`json.JSONDecodeError\` for safer file handling." -m "Documentation: - architecture.txt: Updated the project tree to accurately reflect the current file structure (including logger.py and README.md).
